title: Install advisor — Receiver sidecar in Vector, Datadog metrics
description: Receiver sidecar injected into a Vector forwarder pod, with TenXSummary metrics going to Datadog (not Log10x SaaS). Combines a non-default forwarder with a non-default backend that needs credentials. Canonical chain: discover_env (forwarder_hint='vector') → advise_install (app=receiver, forwarder=vector, backends=['datadog'], backend_credentials.datadog).
prompt: Install the Log10x Receiver as a sidecar in our Vector forwarder pods. Push the engine metrics to our Datadog account — the credentials are in a Kubernetes Secret called `datadog-credentials`.

initial_tool.reason: forwarder_hint overrides demo's fluentd detection so the wizard auto-picks vector.

ground_truth.description: advise_install was called with a snapshot_id arg
advise_install was called with backends containing 'datadog'
advise_install reached a structurally valid wizard outcome
